creator: ino-news@spotteswoode.dnsalias.org
text:
i wrote:

> ethernet: Realtek "RTL8211" gigabit -> use "kldload if_nfe". i've yet
> to get the router up on the nfe0 interface, in the meantime i'm using
> some PCI-card. networking is net-working, absolutely no problems.

sorry, my fault.  you have to use "kldload if_nve" to get onboard LAN
working.  NB:  it's _nve_, not nfe!


regards, clemens
